Convert SSD-eligible analyte rows in a long-format data frame to µg/L

Source: R/globals.R
dot-convert_df_tox_to_ugL.Rd

Uses units.analyte per-row when the column is present; otherwise applies conc_units uniformly to all SSD-eligible rows. Both paths error loudly rather than silently assuming a unit.

Usage

.convert_df_tox_to_ugL(df, ssd_analytes, conc_units = NULL, call_arg = "df")

Arguments

df

Long-format data frame with analyte and value columns.

ssd_analytes

Character vector of SSD-eligible analyte names.

conc_units

Character unit string; required when units.analyte is absent from df.

call_arg

Name of the data-frame argument in the caller, for errors.

Value

df with SSD-eligible value rows converted to µg/L.
